chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P No. D – 615 of 2025 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case (Priority) 1. For orders on office objection at flag ‘A’ 2. For hearing of CMA No.2832/2025 (S/A) 3. For hearing of main case 30-10-2025 Mr. Abdul Sattar Mahessar, Advocate along with Petitioners Mr. Zain-ul-Abdin Maitlo, Advocate for private respondents Agha Ather Hussain Pathan, Assistant AG Sindh Mr. Gulzar Ahmed Malano, Assistant PG for the State along with ASI Zahoor Ahmed, Investigating Officer >>>>>..<<<<< ASI Zahoor Ahmed Leghari, the Investigating Officer Crime No.39 of 2024 of Police Station, Ahmedpur, District Khairpur is present and files statement, which is taken on record, copy whereof is provided to learned counsel for the Petitioners. The Investigating Officer submits that the case has now finally been challaned in the Court of law having jurisdiction. After such statement of the Investigating Officer, learned counsel for the Petitioners, under instructions, does not press the instant Constitutional Petition and submits that for appropriate remedy, the Petitioners will approach the trial Court; however, he submits that some protection of law be provided to the Petitioners enabling them to approach the trial Court, as the petitioners have serious apprehension of their arrest at the hands of police, if they approach the trial Court. Under these circumstances, this Petition is disposed of as not pressed along with listed application. However, the Petitioners shall not be arrested for seven days from today enabling them to approach the trial Court / Sessions Judge concerned for appropriate relief available to them under the law.

Under these circumstances, this Petition is disposed of as not pressed along with listed application. However, the Petitioners shall not be arrested for seven days from today enabling them to approach the trial Court / Sessions Judge concerned for appropriate relief available to them under the law. Judge Judge ARBROHI/PS
